fortune-500/oracle.summary: June 15 WARN Act severance-release deadline active for ~30,000 laid-off workers. Oracle satisfied WARN via 60-day paid admin leave, absorbing WARN pay into severance — leaving newer/excluded workers with zero net payout. Workers face sign-or-forfeit ultimatum. Affected groups include cancer patients, pregnant employees, H-1B visa holders facing deportation, veterans, workers near RSU vesting. State investigations in WA and MO. Coworker.org petition active.
